title: T-058 — QA-050 haccp_plans page (tree sidebar + CCP detail, parity)
prompt:
# T-058 — QA-050 haccp_plans page (parity)

PRD: §8.5 traceability QA-050 ↔ UX QA-013 ↔ prototype `haccp_plans`; §11.5 V-QA-HACCP-001; §7.1 09-e-05
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/haccp-screens.jsx:3-106 (haccp_plans)

## Goal
Server-rendered HACCP plans page with tree sidebar (plans + nested CCPs) + main canvas (selected CCP detail card with spark dots for recent readings) + Approve Plan e-sign hook. 1:1 parity vs prototype.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/src/app/quality/haccp/page.tsx (RSC) loads plans + nested CCPs in one query (LEFT JOIN); URL ?planId= selects plan, ?ccpId= selects CCP.
2. Tree sidebar: shadcn NavigationMenu or custom ul with L0/L1 indentation; click sets URL searchParam.
3. CCP detail card: step, hazard, limits, frequency, method, recent 10 monitoring records as inline SVG spark dots (pass/fail color from within_limits boolean, not client-recompute).
4. Approve Plan button (status='draft' only): opens T-039 ESignBlock modal with meaning='approved'; Server Action activatePlan (T-051) on confirm.
5. recent readings count + deviations count per CCP: aggregated server-side in JOIN.

## Prototype parity
Anchor: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/haccp-screens.jsx:3-106` (haccp_plans).
Parity checklist:
- haccp-layout (tree sidebar + main detail)
- Plan tree (HACCP plans + nested CCPs with L0/L1 indent)
- CCP card with step + hazard + limits + frequency + method
- Spark dots for last 10 readings (pass/fail color)
- Approve Plan e-sign button (only when status=draft, role=quality_lead)
- Recent readings + deviations counts in CCP card

## Files
- apps/web/src/app/quality/haccp/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/haccp/HaccpTreeSidebar.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/haccp/CcpDetailCard.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/haccp/__tests__/haccp.test.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/haccp-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/haccp-screens.jsx:3-106 — parity on structure (tree sidebar + CCP card), visuals (shadcn NavigationMenu/Card/Badge/Button + spark dots SVG), interaction (URL searchParam navigation + Approve opens T-039 ESignBlock + role-gated Approve button) — RTL + checklist
2. Given role=quality_lead AND plan.status='draft', when page renders, then 'Approve Plan' button is visible; on click it opens T-039 ESignBlock with meaning='approved'; on confirm it calls T-051 activatePlan and revalidates
3. Given role=qa_inspector OR plan.status='active', when page renders, then Approve Plan button is hidden
4. UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: haccp.test.tsx asserting parity + role-gated Approve + ESignBlock open + spark dots from within_limits before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test haccp'
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate to RSC + shadcn
- Spark dot pass/fail color is from within_limits (DB GENERATED) — never client-recompute (translation-notes §QA-013)
- Do not skip role gate on Approve Plan
- Do not navigate via client state — URL searchParams only

pipeline_inputs.description: HACCP plans page (RSC tree sidebar + CCP detail with spark dots + Approve Plan e-sign hook). 1:1 parity vs prototype.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server Component loads plans + nested CCPs (LEFT JOIN) and per-CCP recent 10 monitoring records aggregated. Tree sidebar = shadcn NavigationMenu or ul with L0/L1 indent. CCP detail card shows step/hazard/limits/frequency/method + 10 spark dots colored by within_limits (server-fetched). Approve Plan button visible only when status='draft' + role=quality_lead; opens T-039 ESignBlock with meaning='approved'; on confirm calls T-051 activatePlan + page revalidate. URL searchParams: ?planId=, ?ccpId=. Anchor: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/haccp-screens.jsx:3-106.
out_of_scope: Do not build ccp_monitoring page (T-059) or ccp_deviations (T-060)
Do not implement Edit CCP / New HACCP Plan (P2 placeholder pages)
Do not modify HACCP Server Actions (T-051)
acceptance_criteria: Given the HACCP plans page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/haccp-screens.jsx:3-106 (haccp_plans), then it matches on structural parity (tree sidebar + CCP detail card + spark dots row), visual parity (shadcn NavigationMenu/Card/Badge/Button + SVG dots), and interaction parity (URL searchParam navigation, Approve opens T-039 ESignBlock, role-gated Approve button) — verified by RTL render plus parity checklist
Given role=quality_lead AND plan.status='draft', when page renders, then Approve Plan button is visible; on click it opens ESignBlock; on confirm it calls T-051 activatePlan and revalidates
Given role=qa_inspector OR plan.status='active', when page renders, then Approve Plan is hidden

UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.
test_strategy: RED: haccp.test.tsx asserting parity + role-gated Approve + ESignBlock open + spark dots derived from DB within_limits before implementation
For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.
